title: Verify MCP server integration for build/verify stages
description: Verify that MCP servers configured in kody.config.json are passed to the agent during build/verify stages. Add MCP configuration to kody.config.json, trigger the pipeline, and confirm log output shows 'MCP servers enabled for build' and 'MCP servers enabled for verify' messages.
existing_patterns: node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/mcp-config.js:buildMcpConfigJson() - generates Claude Code MCP config JSON from kody.config.json mcp settings
node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/mcp-config.js:isMcpEnabledForStage() - gates MCP to build/verify/review stages via config.mcp.stages
node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/stages/agent.js - passes mcpConfigJson to runner.run() and logs 'MCP servers enabled for {stage}'
node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/kody.config.schema.json - JSON schema defining mcp.enabled, mcp.servers, mcp.stages configuration
